title: ODS-E Procurement Context
description: Procurement and supply chain context for a spare part, including preferred supplier, lead times, and open purchase orders

part_id.description: Spare part identifier matching the spare-parts schema

preferred_supplier.description: Name or identifier of the preferred supplier for this part

avg_lead_time_days.description: Average supplier lead time in calendar days across recent orders

avg_unit_cost.description: Average unit cost across recent purchase orders

last_po_date.description: Date of the most recent purchase order for this part (ISO 8601 date)

open_po_qty.description: Total quantity on open (undelivered) purchase orders

open_po_eta.description: Expected delivery date of the earliest open purchase order (ISO 8601 date)
